function solve(nums) {
    let totalSum = 0;
    const n = nums.length;

    if (n <= 1) {
        return 0;
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
        // Check if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
        if (nums[i] > nums[i+1]) {
            // We need to bridge the gap nums[i] - nums[i+1]
            const gap = nums[i] - nums[i+1];
            totalSum += gap;
        }
    }

    return totalSum;
}
